arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: January deal possible amid Trent Alexander-Arnold contract update
arts.sum: The January transfer is looming and Liverpool must decide whether to act to strengthen Arne Slot's hand in addition to resolving the futures of their out-of-contract stars

arts.ttl: Darwin Nunez outcome becoming inevitable as UEFA decision underlines Liverpool change
arts.sum: Liverpool full analysis after the UEFA Champions League clash in Girona

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes Darwin Nunez admission and explains Liverpool scoring situation
arts.sum: Arne Slot speaks after the UEFA Champions League clash with Girona in Spain

arts.ttl: 'They have to be favourites' - Liverpool 'perfect' in Champions League
arts.sum: Six wins out of six and "one of the world's best keepers" returning to the starting XI - are Liverpool favourites to win the Champions League?

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah’s landmark goal pulls Liverpool clear in Champions League
arts.sum: The Egypt international and France counterpart Kylian Mbappe both joined the 50-goal club in the competition.

arts.ttl: Girona 0-1 Liverpool: Arne Slot reveals Alisson Becker "joke" after Champions League masterclass
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot reveals a "joke" between his players and Alisson Becker after the goalkeeper's fabulous performance against Girona in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Alisson Becker speaks out on injury return as Liverpool message sent
arts.sum: Alisson returned to Liverpool's starting line-up and delivered an excellent performance in the 1-0 win over Girona

arts.ttl: Arne Slot far from happy with Liverpool performance in Girona victory
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah’s 63rd-minute penalty proved to be the difference at Girona.

arts.ttl: Fuming Arne Slot declares himself 'far from pleased' as he tears into Liverpool performance - despite making it six wins from six against Girona in the Champions League
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE AT THE ESTADI MONTILIVI: A Mohamed Salah penalty in the second half kept up the Reds' 100 per cent record in the Champions League to all but secure their knockout berth.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah penalty at Girona sees Liverpool maintain perfect Champions League record
arts.sum: Alisson, Gomez, Van Dijk, Diaz (Endo, 88), Szoboszlai, Nunez (Gakpo, 70), Salah, Jones (Elliott, 76), Robertson, Gravenberch, Alexander-Arnold. Paulo Gazzaniga stopped Joe Gomez from scoring his first Liverpool goal after four minutes by clawing away the defender's header from an Andy Robertson corner.
